benefits.description: Decrease in injection site reaction redness and welts after KPV shot, injected first

side_effects.description: Redness and welts from Easy Touch syringes (1ml, 0.5ml, and 0.3ml sizes all problematic)

protocol_notes: Tried Easy Touch syringes from multiple vendors (Vitality Medical and Diabetic Pro) and experienced issues with all sizes. Advocates for filtering peptides and using pens. Found KPV injection helpful for reducing injection site reactions.
